title: Calibrachoa humilis
taxonomy: Calibrachoa humilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. It is native to South America and is a member of the genus Calibrachoa, which is closely related to petunias. The Solanaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants, including potatoes, tomatoes, and peppers. This family is part of the larger clade Asterids, which also includes plants such as daisies and sunflowers. Calibrachoa humilis is further classified into various subgroups based on its morphology and genetic characteristics.
